raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding an unresolved travel insurance claim associated with my JetBlue Mastercard. The claim is administered by XXXX. 

I filed this claim in XX/XX/year> for a non-refundable JetBlue Vacations package that could not be used because the resort ( XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX, XXXX ) was closed due to hurricane damage. The travel dates were XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX. 

All requested documentation was submitted by XXXX XXXX, including proof of purchase, itinerary, proof of resort closure, and a written letter from JetBlue XXXX  confirming that the trip was cancelled due to weather and that no credit or reimbursement was issued. 

Despite providing all required documentation, XXXX has not issued a determination and continues to delay processing the claim while requesting documentation that has already been provided. There is no additional documentation available. 

I am requesting CFPB assistance to require the issuer and claims administrator to either approve the claim under the travel protection benefit or provide a formal written determination without further delay.
